mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id, t1.patient_user_id, t1.status, t1.total_price, t1.type, t1.five_star, t2.id AS doctor_user_id, t1.have_time, t1.end_time, t1.start_time, t2.name AS doctor_name, t2.head_img AS doctor_head_img, t2.hospital_name, t2.depart_name, t2.office_holder_name, t3.name AS sick_name, t1.create_time, t1.update_time, t1.order_num FROM t_hos_visit t1 LEFT JOIN t_doctor_user t2 ON t2.id = t1.doctor_user_id LEFT JOIN t_hos_sick t3 ON t3.id = t1.hos_sick_id WHERE t1.patient_user_id = #{patientUserId}
AND t1.status = "WAIT"
AND t1.status in ("HAVE","START","PAY")
AND t1.status = "END"
AND t1.status in ("DONE", "CANCEL", "DECLINE")
AND t1.status in ('WAIT','HAVE','START','END','DONE','CANCEL','DECLINE','PAY')
ORDER BY t1.update_time DESC limit #{startNum}, #{limit}

SELECT t1.id, t1.patient_user_id, t1.status, t1.total_price, t1.type, t1.five_star, t2.id AS doctor_user_id, t1.have_time, t1.end_time, t1.start_time, t2.name AS doctor_name, t2.head_img AS doctor_head_img, t2.hospital_name, t2.depart_name, t2.office_holder_name, t3.name AS sick_name, t1.create_time, t1.update_time, t1.order_num, t1.hos_sick_id, t1.msg, t3.im_user_id, t3.im_user_sig, t3.age, t3.sex, CASE WHEN t1.health_info IS NOT NULL AND t1.health_info != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_health_info, CASE WHEN t1.base_info IS NOT NULL AND t1.base_info != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_base_info FROM t_hos_visit t1 LEFT JOIN t_doctor_user t2 ON t2.id = t1.doctor_user_id LEFT JOIN t_hos_sick t3 ON t3.id = t1.hos_sick_id WHERE t1.patient_user_id = #{patientUserId} ORDER BY t1.update_time DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.patient_user_id, t1.status, t1.total_price, t1.type, t1.order_num, t1.pay_time, t1.have_time, t1.content, t1.doctor_user_id, t1.five_star, t1.first_visit, t1.doctor_advice, t1.end_time, t1.start_time, t2.id AS doctor_user_id, t2.name AS doctor_name, t2.hospital_name, t2.depart_name, t2.office_holder_name, t2.head_img AS doctor_head_img, t3.name AS sick_name, t1.create_time, t1.update_time, t4.id AS hos_visit_img_id, t4.hos_visit_id, t4.img FROM t_hos_visit t1 LEFT JOIN t_doctor_user t2 ON t2.id = t1.doctor_user_id LEFT JOIN t_hos_sick t3 ON t3.id = t1.hos_sick_id LEFT JOIN t_hos_visit_img t4 ON t4.hos_visit_id = t1.id WHERE t1.patient_user_id = #{patientUserId} AND t1.order_num = #{orderNum}
AND t1.status = "WAIT"
AND t1.status in ("HAVE","START")
AND t1.status = "END"
AND t1.status in ("DONE", "CANCEL", "DECLINE")
ORDER BY t1.update_time DESC
